name: Richard Norwood
title: Revenue Architect
bio:
I've spent 15+ years in the trenches of revenue optimization — from Fortune 500 consulting to building my own businesses from zero. I don't teach theory. I build systems that print money.

My approach is simple: find where revenue leaks out, plug the holes, and build systems that scale. The Revenue Journey Assessment Tool (RJAT) is the distillation of everything I've learned into a 5-stage diagnostic framework.

Every business has a Revenue Journey. Most don't know where they are on it. That's where I come in.
